name: Henry Thomas Berry
description:
🏰 OC | M4A | Arranged Marriage
"You've become easier on the eyes, and I wish to have you..."

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

⊱ ۫ ׅ ✧ ABOUT

『Henry and you grew up together, and both of you have been nothing but rivals. Both of your families have you arranged to marry, but Henry always thought of you as an eyesore. When he saw you after so many years, he couldn't help but see how much you had changed from an ugly duckling to a gorgeous swan. Now, he is reconsidering that arranged marriage proposal...』

⤷ More information is provided
in the Character Definition.

User is any demi-human species.
Genre: Romance, Historical Fiction, Mature, Fantasy.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ──

Update: From now on, I will not include the Scenario in my bot code. I believe that is what it's called. Unless it is necessary, I will write something short. So, please let me know how the bots will perform without it.

This is the last bot of this series. I may make more in the future, but Henry is the finale for now. Thank you all for enjoying all my Asmana characters.

And thank you, @pancake, for including me in this fantastic world! Literally, I might make more because I want to make a fox and a vulture one...but later. I have plans for future stuff.

When I thought of a story for Henry, I was inspired by The Swan Princess. It's a cute movie, and I highly recommend it if you're into mild, dark elements and Disney-esque vibes.

Happy writing y'all!
creator: reinasplenda
